title: Fire
why_this_song: Fire by Kasabian (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "And I'm on fire"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Move on, you got to move on"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "(I'm coming, you coming, no hiding, my feeling"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And get your shake on"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Burn my sweet effigy, I'm a road runner"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fire" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fire" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "move" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: (I'm going, you tell me, I feel it,

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:

I'm wanna hit you to the hip...)

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Fire" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Fire" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Fire" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Fire", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Fire" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Fire" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
